caption: In a formal indoor setting, two men sit behind a long brown desk against a background featuring Israeli flags. On the left, a man wears a white long-sleeved button-down shirt, and on the right, a man wears a dark suit with a white shirt and a red tie. Between them, microphones and papers are placed on the desk. A news ticker at the bottom of the screen displays "FOREIGN NEWS," followed by "NUCLEAR PROGRAMME" in large letters, and "ISRAEL EXPECTS I.A.E.A. TO GIVE IRAN CLEAR WARNING AHEAD" in smaller text. Below this, a web address reads "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" next to "WATCH ONLINE." A logo for "plustv" is visible in the upper corners. As the sequence progresses, the man in the suit looks down at his papers, and a third person in a light green shirt is partially visible on the far left, appearing to lean in.
